author: anon-59ff128d
content: Eliminated the fill_buf peek in detect_buffered. Both detect_stdin and detect_buffered now use a shared read_bounded helper that reads all bytes via Read::take(MAX_STDIN_BYTES + 1) before inspecting content, and a shared classify_buffer function for the JSON detection logic. This removes the partial-buffer edge case where the opening brace might not appear in the peeked window.
